log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+6=13 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ 1/1 targets affected.
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 95/99
→ ⚠ Archmage: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: FAIL! 32 cold damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):18+4=22 vs DC 16] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:15+6=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank healed for 6 HP. HP: 33/59
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:14+6=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank healed for 5 HP. HP: 26/59
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Armored Tank: FAIL! 31 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
